mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notification_deliveries WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_deliveries (webhook_config_id, event_id, event_type, payload, endpoint_url, signature, status, retry_count, next_attempt_at, deleted) VALUES (#{webhookConfigId}, #{eventId}, #{eventType}, #{payload}, #{endpointUrl}, '', #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextAttemptAt}, FALSE)
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.event_id, d.event_type, d.payload, d.endpoint_url, c.encrypted_secret, d.retry_count, d.next_attempt_at FROM notification_deliveries d JOIN webhook_configs c ON c.id = d.webhook_config_id AND c.deleted = FALSE AND c.enabled = TRUE WHERE d.deleted = FALSE AND d.status IN ('PENDING', 'RETRY') AND d.next_attempt_at <= #{now} ORDER BY d.next_attempt_at, d.id LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_deliveries SET status = 'PROCESSING', claimed_at = UTC_TIMESTAMP() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RETRY') AND deleted = FALSE

UPDATE notification_deliveries SET status = 'RETRY', claimed_at = NULL, next_attempt_at = UTC_TIMESTAMP(), failure_reason = 'Delivery worker claim expired' WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND claimed_at < #{expiredBefore} AND deleted = FALSE

UPDATE notification_deliveries SET status = 'SUCCEEDED', last_attempt_at = #{attemptedAt}, response_status = #{responseStatus}, failure_reason = NULL, claimed_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING' AND deleted = FALSE

UPDATE notification_deliveries SET status = 'RETRY', retry_count = #{retryCount}, last_attempt_at = #{attemptedAt}, next_attempt_at = #{nextAttemptAt}, response_status = #{responseStatus}, failure_reason = #{failureReason}, claimed_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING' AND deleted = FALSE

UPDATE notification_deliveries SET status = 'FAILED', retry_count = #{retryCount}, last_attempt_at = #{attemptedAt}, response_status = #{responseStatus}, failure_reason = #{failureReason}, claimed_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING' AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE notification_deliveries SET status = 'RETRY', retry_count = 0, next_attempt_at = UTC_TIMESTAMP(), claimed_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
